rule_metadata.name: ft_pdf
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Signature to trigger on PDF file magic.

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_pdf
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20141230"
		desc = "Signature to trigger on PDF file magic."

	strings:
		$pdf = "%PDF"

	condition:
		$pdf in ( 0 .. 1024 )
}
